# RE'NOIR

> Premium inspired fragrances, handcrafted in Sri Lanka.

RE'NOIR is a Sri Lanka-based fragrance brand that creates premium inspired fragrances blended with rare, master-grade oils. Founded in 2025, RE'NOIR produces limited-batch 10ml glass atomizer sprays with discounted launch pricing from Rs. 3,399.

## Products

- **Noir I** — Inspired by Dior Sauvage. Fresh, woody, amber. Discounted from Rs. 4,000 to Rs. 3,399.
- **Noir II** — Inspired by Creed Aventus. Smoky, fruity, commanding. Discounted from Rs. 4,000 to Rs. 3,399.
- **Noir III** — Inspired by Azzaro Most Wanted. Warm, spicy, seductive. Discounted from Rs. 4,000 to Rs. 3,399.
- **Noir IV** — Inspired by Baccarat Rouge 540. Warm, ambery, unisex, niche. Discounted from Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 4,249.

## What makes RE'NOIR different

- Rare master-grade fragrance oils
- Carefully selected fragrance materials used in each blend
- Every bottle hand-measured and hand-filled in Sri Lanka
- 10ml glass atomizer format for portable, premium use
- Limited first-batch availability

## How to order

Available via Instagram DM: @renoir.perfume
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/message/GRUMA6R4S467O1
Phone: 0704427371
Email: renoirperfumeceylon@gmail.com
Website: https://renoirperfumes.me

## Pricing

Noir I, Noir II and Noir III: Rs. 3,399 per 10ml glass spray after discount.
Noir IV: Rs. 4,249 per 10ml glass spray after discount.
